About Gali
A Voice Born to Move You

Growing up surrounded by Latin music, Gali developed a passion for performance that goes far beyond just singing. She connects — with the music, with the room, and with every person watching.

Based in Chicago, IL, Gali has performed at private events, quinceañeras, weddings, and banquet halls across the area. Her blend of Latin pop, regional Mexican, and heartfelt ballads creates a performance that feels personal every single time.

Whether performing for 20 people or 200, Gali brings the same energy, professionalism, and passion to every event she graces.

LivePerformer
BilingualEN / ES
ChicagoBased Artist
